verses.text: “Hih huihpi in ka dip hong kuasak a, ka dip vana khai hong bangsak hi
Ama kam panin a hong gingkhia hih vanging Pasian' pauna awging, limtakin ngai in
Amah in vanah khua phiasak a, leimong khat pan mong khat dong a taan' hi
Tua ciangin a vanglian vanging, ama awging hong kiza a, tua hun sungteng mahin khua a phiaphia hi
Pasian' sawlna tawh na lamdangpipi piang a, eite' theih zawhloh thute a hong piang hi
Amah in leitungah vuk a kia dingin sawl a, guah tampi tak a zusak hi
Amah in mihingte a nasep uh khawlsak a, amah a gamtang ahihna a kilangsak hi
Gamsate in a lupna ngei delh uh a, a kua sungah bucip uh hi
Leitaw lam panin guahpi hong zu a, leilu lam panin huihpi hong nung hi
Pasian' husan'na in tuite khalsak a, tui lianpite khalin sik bangin a sak hi
Amah in meiipi nomsak a, meiipi in khua a phiasak hi
Pasian' deihna zui-in a kikhin kawikawi hi. Leitung mun khempeuhah pai-in, Pasian' sawl teng a sem uh hi
Pasian in mihingte gim a piakna ding ahi a, pahtakna a lahna ding ahi zongin, leitungah tu-a bangin a piangsak hi
“Job aw, tawlkhat khawlin ngai in la, Pasian' bawlsa na lamdangte ngaihsun dih in
Pasian in thu pia a, meii lak panin khua a phiatsak theihna na thei hiam
Bangmah in a len lopi-in vantungah meii a omsak theihna, a lamdang hih ama siamna na thei hiam
Leitaw lam huihpi nasia takin a nun' laitakin na puan sungah khua-ul kai-in na om hi
Limlang bangin a sak mahmah van peekpi ama hih bangin zalzo na hi hiam
Pasian kiangah ka gen ding uh hong hilh in. A hawmpi-in ka om uh a, ka gen ding uh omlo hi
Pasian tawh kiho theihna ding ka ngen kei ding hi. Kei hong suksiatna dingin kei kipia ding ka hi hiam
“Tawlkhat sung khuavak kimu vetlo a, guah leh meii in a liah hi. Tua ciangin huih hong nungin tuate khempeuh a mutsiang hi
Kham meel khuavak leilu lam pan hong taang a, Pasian' minthan'na pen zahtakna tawh kidimsak hi
Pasian vanglian mahmah a, eite' theihzawh hilo hi. Amah thuman mahmah a, thutang takin na a sem hi
Tua ahih manin mi khempeuh in amah a zahtakna, mipil a kisate amah in a donlohna, lamdangsak ding hilo hi.” a ci hi.
